description: Florence-2-base student model fine-tuned for ISO 6346 container-number OCR per §6.1 of IMAGE-ANALYSIS-MODERNIZATION.md. Consumes IInferenceRunner with model family 'container-ocr' and exposes IContainerNumberRecognizer. Decoder constrained to [A-Z]{4}[0-9]{7} ∪ <unreadable>; ISO 6346 mod-11 check-digit gate runs as post-process. Falls back to manual-entry queue (decode_path = 'manual_queue_required') when check digit fails or mean-token confidence < 0.85.

ModelId.description: Logical model id passed to IInferenceRunner.LoadAsync. Should resolve to a Florence-2 ONNX export at <storage>/models/container-ocr/<version>/model.onnx.

ModelVersion.description: Artifact version (SemVer). Multiple versions can ship behind the same logical id; the host promotes one as primary.

ConfidenceGate.description: Mean-token-softmax confidence threshold below which decode_path is forced to 'manual_queue_required'. §6.1.7 default 0.85, raised to 0.92 for >20% occluded ROIs (§6.1.8).

BeamWidth.description: Constrained beam search width. 4 is the recommended baseline; 8 trades 1.4× latency for ~0.3pp EM in early Florence-2 ablations.

MaxTokenBudget.description: Hard token budget T per §6.1.8 'Decoder loop / repetition' guard. 11 chars + EOS + BOS slack = 16.
